digital.success_message: Yay! The box is full! Great job!

instructions: Step 1: Put {target_count} items next to a target.
Step 3: Ask the kid to move each item one by one as they count.
Step 4: Ask the kid to choose the flashcard with the final count.
Step 1: Make sure you have some open floor space.
Step 2: Ask your kid to do {target_count} {action_name}.
Step 4: Give them a big high-five!
Step 1: Place {target_count} toys or stuffed animals on the floor.
Step 2: Hand your child the right 'food' (blocks, spoons, etc.) for each one.
Step 3: Ask them to feed each friend.
Step 4: When they are done, ask: 'Is everyone full?'

categories.name: Jungle
categories.instruction: Put the wild animals in the jungle!

categories.name: Farm
categories.instruction: Put the farm animals in the barn!

categories.name: Ocean
categories.instruction: Put the sea creatures in the ocean!

instructions: Step 1: Create physical zones for the categories: {category_names}.
Step 2: Tell your child the rules: {category_instructions}
Step 3: Hand them the mixed pile.
Step 4: Ask them to sort the pile until the floor is clean!
